about_intro_bold: Hi, I'm Sawa. I'm from Taiwan and currently living in Tokyo.
about_intro_birth: I enjoy talking with people from different backgrounds and trying new things in everyday life.
about_intro_skills: “Translating an abstract life through different languages.”
about_intro_love: To me, language is not only Chinese, Japanese, or English. Music, code, and the way we see the world can also become languages.
about_intro_work_hobby: I hope to use music to organize my feelings, and code to turn imagination into something people can see and use.
about_intro_hobby: I like classical music, J-Pop, movies, games, studying at cafes
about_intro_hobby_extra: , and the atmosphere of DJ events.
career_item_2018: 2018 Graduated from Taoyuan Yangming High School, Taiwan
career_item_2025_work: From 2025 – Full-Stack Engineer at Yutaka Corporation
services_item_web: Web applications and admin dashboard design / implementation
services_item_api: Frontend/backend integration and API design / implementation
services_item_deploy: Database design and Docker / AWS deployment setup
services_item_support: Existing UI improvements, responsive fixes, and operation improvements
